El Monte Flores.description: Mexican-American street gang based in El Monte, California, founded in the 1940s or 1950s. It is the largest Hispanic gang in the San Gabriel Valley and one of the oldest in Los Angeles County. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, murder, and other crimes, and is allied with the Mexican Mafia and Sureños.

descriptions: El Monte Flores has Azusa 13 as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: El Monte Flores has Bassett Grande as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: El Monte Flores has Lomas as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: El Monte Flores, as a Sureño gang, is controlled by the Mexican Mafia in the prison system.
edges.evidence_quote: Like all Sureños once they are in the prison system they set aside their rivalry and unite under the Sureño Banner and are controlled by La eMe.

descriptions: El Monte Flores has NS/ES Bolen as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: El Monte Flores has Sangra as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: El Monte Flores is a member of the Sureños umbrella.
edges.evidence_quote: Even though El Monte Flores are a Sureño gang and use the number 13 (to denote the 13th letter, M, in the alphabet.)

descriptions: Sureños are allied with El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 18th Street gang, Armenian Power, Aryan Brotherhood, Avenues, El Monte Flores, Familia 27, Florencia 13, Forming Kaos, Gulf Cartel, Mexican Mafia, Mongols, Ontario Varrio Sur, Playboys, Puente 13, Santa Monica 13, Toonerville Rifa 13, Vineland Boys, White Fence, Temple Street (gang)

descriptions: Sureños are allied with El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: El Monte Flores

descriptions: Gente Nueva attacked Los Muertos, a rival gang allied with Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the gunmen were plotting to kill members of Los Muertos , a rival gang at the service of the Juárez Cartel

descriptions: Juárez Cartel used Los Muertos as allies in the war against Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cártel de Juárez usó a Barrio Azteca y Los Muertos para luchar contra las fuerzas del Cártel de Sinaloa

Vårbynätverket.description: Crime gang based in Vårby, Huddinge Municipality, Stockholm, active from the 2010s. Led by Chihab Lamouri, involved in drug trafficking, shootings, and kidnappings. Members sentenced in 2021 using EncroChat evidence. Still active.

descriptions: EPL and PRT were both members of the CGSB.
edges.evidence_quote: En 1987 formó parte de la Coordinadora Guerrillera Simón Bolívar (CGSB) junto a las FARC-EP (con las que tuvo enfrentamientos históricos ), la UC-ELN , el M-19 (con quienes había desarrollado acciones conjuntas principalmente en Antioquia ) el Movimiento Armado Quintín Lame y el PRT .

descriptions: ISPP is an affiliate of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Philippines Province (ISPP) operates in the Philippines, primarily in Mindanao.

descriptions: ISPP emerged from AKP.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: ISPP emerged from BIFF.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: ISPP emerged from Maute Group.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

Young Boys Inc..description: Major drug organization based in Detroit, Michigan, founded in 1976 by Dwayne Davis, Bernard Boykins, Reginald Chestnut, and Charles Lindsey. Among the first African American drug cartels to operate on inner-city street corners, they used minors as couriers and controlled about 80% of Detroit's heroin trade from 1978 to 1987. The organization was crippled by the 1982 murder of Davis and subsequent indictments.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are mentioned alongside Young Boys Inc. as comparable Detroit gangs, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Like other Detroit street gangs, such as their Westside Detroit counterparts in the late 1970s; the Nasty Flynns (later the NF Bangers), and 7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs or the drug consortiums of the 1980s such as Young Boys Inc., Pony Down, Best Friends, Black Mafia Family and the Chambers Brothers, the Errol Flynns grew out of the racial and economic unrest that transformed Detroit in the late 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: Best Friends rose to prominence after YBI's downfall, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Many gangs, such as "Best Friends", "Pony Down", " Black Mafia Family ", and " The Chambers Brothers ", rose to prominence in the wake of the YBI

descriptions: Black Mafia Family rose to prominence after YBI's downfall, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Many gangs, such as "Best Friends", "Pony Down", " Black Mafia Family ", and " The Chambers Brothers ", rose to prominence in the wake of the YBI

descriptions: The Chambers Brothers rose to prominence after YBI's downfall, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Many gangs, such as "Best Friends", "Pony Down", " Black Mafia Family ", and " The Chambers Brothers ", rose to prominence in the wake of the YBI

descriptions: Pony Down rose to prominence after YBI's downfall, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Many gangs, such as "Best Friends", "Pony Down", " Black Mafia Family ", and " The Chambers Brothers ", rose to prominence in the wake of the YBI

descriptions: Leisure family was affiliated with and under control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Syrian-Lebanese crime families in St. Louis were affiliated with and under the control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family headed by Anthony Giordano.

descriptions: Michaels and Leisure families engaged in open warfare after Giordano's death.
edges.evidence_quote: After Giordano's death from cancer on August 29, 1980, the Michaels and Leisure families entered into open warfare with one another.

descriptions: DDP has an association with the Colombian crime cartel for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang holds a large share of the cocaine market due to an association with the Colombian crime cartel

descriptions: Tortilla Flats is listed as a rival of Tree Top Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Tortilla Flats, Most Compton Crips

Loyal to Familia.description: Loyal to Familia is a Danish street gang established in Nørrebro, Copenhagen in 2013. It engaged in drug trafficking and had a membership of 225 by 2017. In 2021, the Danish Supreme Court ordered the gang dissolved, ruling it unconstitutional for lacking a legal purpose.

descriptions: AK81 lists Loyal to Familia as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Immigrant gangs (especially the gang from Blågårdsplads): Black Cobra , Black Scorpions, Loyal to Familia , Black Jackets

descriptions: Bandidos were in a conflict with LTF in Helsingør.
edges.evidence_quote: An attack on a man in the Vapnagård housing estate in Helsingør on 30 June 2015 was linked to a conflict between the Bandidos and the immigrant gang LTF.

descriptions: Hells Angels and LTF were at war over cannabis trade monopoly.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels became involved in a war with the Loyal to Familia (LTF) gang to monopolize the cannabis trade in Christiania.

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had major confrontations with Los Borrachos del Tablón, the barra brava of River Plate.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of ... River Plate (Los Borrachos del Tablón)

descriptions: Alfano clan split into two factions: loyalists to Alfano and those following Caiazzo, leading to a faida.
edges.evidence_quote: faida dei quartieri collinari Vomero-Arenella : ... lo storico clan capeggiato da Giovanni Alfano si scisse, formando due distinti schieramenti. Da un lato, gli affiliati di vecchia militanza al gruppo Alfano, dall'altro quelli rimasti fedeli al pluri-pregiudicato Antonio Caiazzo

descriptions: Infobox lists Fischer Fools as allies of D-Block Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Fischer Fools

descriptions: Sorianiello group had a pact with Nigerian individuals over drug debt, which turned into conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo quanto accertato la spedizione punitiva venne architettata per colpire Oviamwonyi e un altro nigeriano Leo Uwadiae, con i quali i "Soraniello" avevano stipulato un patto: il pagamento di duemila euro per la restituzione della droga.

'Ndrina Codispoti.description: The Codispoti are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Nirta-Scalzone, Romeo, Libri, and De Stefano families. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking from South America to Italy and other European countries, and has acted as mediators in the Reggio Calabria mafia war. They are considered a reference point for the 'Ndrangheta in Rome.

descriptions: Codispoti are allies with Libri.
edges.evidence_quote: e anche con i Libri e De Stefano di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Morabito asked Codispoti for support for illicit affairs.
edges.evidence_quote: La cosca dei Morabito di Africo chiese appoggio per i propri affari illeciti

descriptions: Codispoti are allies of Nirta-Scalzone, with family ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Nirta-Scalzone (con cui hanno anche dei legami parentali)

descriptions: Codispoti are allies of Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Nirta-Scalzone (con cui hanno anche dei legami parentali), i Romeo

descriptions: Codispoti are allies with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: e anche con i Libri e De Stefano di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Codispoti acted as mediators on behalf of De Stefano in the mafia war.
edges.evidence_quote: Furono da mediatori dalla parte dei De Stefano nella guerra di mafia di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with Codispoti, with familial ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali)

descriptions: The Canadian club was independent of the US club of the same name.
edges.evidence_quote: They were apparently independent of a US-based motorcycle club of the same name that was founded in 1965 in Louisville, Kentucky.

descriptions: Guang Ji was created by an associate of Wah Kee's founder, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: His associate Zhào Guǎnghéng (赵广恒) created Guǎng Jì (广记) in Guangzhou , China

Brighton razor gangs.description: Groups of razor-wielding youths involved in racketeering on local racecourses in Brighton during the 1930s and 1940s. They formed the background for Graham Greene's novel Brighton Rock. The gangs were dominated by the Sabini gang from London's Clerkenwell area, led by Charles Sabini.

descriptions: The Sabini gang was one of the gangs operating in Brighton, implying inclusion or presence among the Brighton razor gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Gangs operating in Brighton included the Sabini gang from London's Clerkenwell area.

Bonnot Gang.description: French anarchist group that operated in France and Belgium from 1911 to 1912. Composed of illegalist anarchists, they pioneered motorized robberies and bank raids using cars and repeating rifles. The gang was named after Jules Bonnot, who died in a shootout with police. They were known for their desperate courage and tragicomic portrayal in the press.

descriptions: The Gang des Tractions Avant derived its methods from the Bonnot Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Its methods were largely derived from those of the Bonnot Gang

ShadowCrew.description: ShadowCrew was a cybercrime forum operating from 2002 to 2004, founded by Brett Johnson, Seth Sanders, and Kim Marvin Taylor. It facilitated credit card fraud, hacking, phishing, and drug sales, with around 4,000 members. The site was infiltrated by the US Secret Service through informant Albert Gonzalez, leading to its shutdown.

descriptions: Brett Johnson, a ShadowCrew admin, was embedded as admin on CardersMarket.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Anglerphish' embedded him, then dubbed by Secret Service agents as 'The Original Internet Godfather', as admins on both ScandinavianCarding and CardersMarket.

descriptions: ShadowCrew emerged from Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: ShadowCrew emerged early in 2002 from another underground site, counterfeitlibrary.com , which was run by Brett Johnson

descriptions: Brett Johnson, a ShadowCrew admin, was embedded as admin on ScandinavianCarding.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Anglerphish' embedded him, then dubbed by Secret Service agents as 'The Original Internet Godfather', as admins on both ScandinavianCarding and CardersMarket.

descriptions: Siru is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: some GAS Gang members from Somerleyton Estate now referring to themselves as GAS Siru or Siru

descriptions: Harakat Khilafat Baluch joined ISKP.
edges.evidence_quote: Notable among these are the Omar Ghazi Group, Shamali Khilafat, Gansu Hui Group, Harakat Khilafat Baluch, Jaysh ul Islam, Mullah Bakhtwar's group, the Shamsatoo group, and radical student groups in Pakistan and eastern Afghanistan.

descriptions: Codispoti are allies of Nirta-Scalzone, with family ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Nirta-Scalzone (con cui hanno anche dei legami parentali)

descriptions: After 1995, the Giorgi allied with the Nirta Scalzone.
edges.evidence_quote: si alleano con i Nirta Scalzone

descriptions: Piromalli, Nirta (Scalzone), and Araniti cooperated in extortion and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 febbraio 2018 si concludono le operazioni Martingala e Vello d'oro ... nei confronti di presunti affiliati ai Nirta (Scalzone) , degli Araniti e dei Piromalli

descriptions: Gulf Cartel absorbed Los Texas in 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2001, el Cártel del Golfo absorbió a Los Texas

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division and Black Order cooperated to form a border patrol militia.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen and Finnish lodge of the Black Order also formed a border patrol militia in co-operation, recruiting former military police.

descriptions: al-Jamaa al-Islamiyah is the Lebanese branch of the Muslim Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: the Lebanese branch, known as al-Jamaa al-Islamiyah

descriptions: Los Angeles boss Tommaso Gambino associated with a Bonanno soldier.
edges.evidence_quote: and also associated with Bonnano family soldier Salvatore "Harry Leonard" Giglio.

Tri-City Skins.description: Ontario-based white power group active from 1997 to 2012 in the Kitchener-Waterloo and Cambridge area. Engaged in intimidation, assault, vandalism, and property crimes. Some members were arrested for weapons and drug trafficking offenses.

Gremium Motorcycle Club.description: German outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1972 in Mannheim. Claims to be the largest German MC, with chapters across Europe and a prospect chapter in Thailand. Has been subject to criminal investigations and a temporary ban in Baden-Württemberg. Associated with organized crime including drug and weapons trafficking.

descriptions: Infobox lists Gremium MC as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra , Comanchero MC , Cossacks MC , Finks MC , Gremium MC , Gypsy Joker MC , Hells Angels MC , Kinfolk MC , Mongols MC , No Surrender MC , Notorious MC , Rebels MC , Red Devils MC , Rock Machine MC , Satudarah MC , Vagos MC

descriptions: Gremium MC is listed as a rival of Bandidos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra, Comanchero MC, Cossacks MC, Finks MC, Gremium MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Hells Angels MC, Kinfolk MC, Mongols MC, No Surrender MC, Notorious MC, Rebels MC, Red Devils MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, Vagos MC

descriptions: Gremium MC is a rival of Bandidos per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium MC

descriptions: Bandidos and Gremium were in a turf war in North Zealand.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos have also been involved in a turf war with Gremium in North Zealand after Gremium opened a chapter in the traditional Bandidos stronghold of Helsinge on 3 February 2017 by patching-over the Local BrotherHood (LBH) gang.

descriptions: Bad 7 MC is a support club for Gremium.
edges.evidence_quote: several associate chapters (Bad 7 MC support club) in Germany

descriptions: Gremium became the largest German MC after Bones MC chapters patched over to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium claims to be the largest German motorcycle club since the patchover of the also formerly Mannheim-based German chapters of the Bones MC to the Hells Angels MC in 1999

descriptions: Gremium's rise to largest German MC followed the patchover of Bones MC chapters to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium claims to be the largest German motorcycle club since the patchover of the also formerly Mannheim-based German chapters of the Bones MC to the Hells Angels MC in 1999

descriptions: Gremium absorbed the Local BrotherHood gang to establish a chapter in Helsinge.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium opened a chapter in the traditional Bandidos stronghold of Helsinge on 3 February 2017 by patching-over the Local BrotherHood (LBH) gang.

descriptions: Rock Machine allied with Gremium MC during European expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: During the club's expansion into Europe, it made an alliance with Gremium MC, one of the largest motorcycle clubs in Germany.

descriptions: An X-Team member attacked a Gremium MC member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 April 2012, an X-Team member used his car to force a member of the Gremium Motorcycle Club off the road near Westerkappeln.

descriptions: Al-Rahman Legion is listed as an opponent of Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Al-Rahman Legion

descriptions: Al-Rahman Legion is an opponent of Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Al-Rahman Legion

descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham had a ceasefire with al-Rahman Legion after internal disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: A ceasefire agreement between the Rahman Legion and Ahrar al-Sham was implemented on 9 August.

descriptions: Venice 13 was rival with Santa Monica 17th St, then settled truce and formed alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Venice 13's main rivals were the Santa Monica 13 and Santa Monica 17th St gangs, however they both settled a truce and formed an alliance.

descriptions: Mara Mao Mao may have established links with Los Batos Locos for extortion and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Algunas fuentes indican que la Mara Mao Mao podría haber establecido vínculos con otras agrupaciones criminales en la región Los Charros, Los Batos Locos y Los Rivas, principalmente en actividades relacionadas con la extorsión y el narcotráfico.

descriptions: Ashur Forces is a united force of Nattoreh and Khabour Guards, both part of SDF.
edges.evidence_quote: the Assyrian Democratic Party announced the creation of a united military leadership for Nattoreh and the Khabour Guards . The united force will be known as the 'Ashur Forces'.

descriptions: Canadian Lancers merged into Satan's Choice in 1965.
edges.evidence_quote: a 1965 alliance of four regional motorcycle clubs: the Phantom Riders of Oshawa, the Canadian Lancers of Scarborough, the Throttle Twisters of Preston, and the Wild Ones of Port Credit.

Los Paisas.description: Colombian criminal and narcoparamilitary organization based in Medellín, formed in 2008 from remnants of paramilitary groups demobilized during peace talks (2004-2006). It was founded by former members of the Oficina de Envigado after the extradition of Don Berna. The group engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. It was dissolved by Colombian security forces in 2014, with remaining members joining the Clan Úsuga.

descriptions: Los Paisas was founded by a former AUC member, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Luis Fernando Jaramillo Arroyave, conocido por el alias de Nano . Luis Fernando era señalado por múltiples delitos, entre ellos, en la participación y posterior fundación de la bacrim Los Paisas

descriptions: Daniel Rendón's men fought against Los Paisas.
edges.evidence_quote: Los hombres de Daniel Rendón comenzaron una lucha contra Los Paisas

descriptions: Clan Úsuga recruited former members of Los Paisas, indicating a cooperative absorption.
edges.evidence_quote: situación aprovechada por el 'Clan Úsuga', que ha reclutado a exmiembros de los Rastrojos y Los Paisas para aumentar su pie de fuerza

descriptions: Clan del Golfo and Los Paisas held a meeting in 2012 to agree on territory division and future alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes del Clan Úsuga, al igual que de los desaparecidos Rastrojos y Paisas, habrían sostenido una reunión clandestina en 2012 en Medellín , para acordar una repartición de "territorios" a nivel nacional y así acabar con los enfrentamientos entre las mismas organizaciones criminales y comenzar a trabajar en conjunto para una futura alianza.

descriptions: Factions of Los Paisas have strategically allied with Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: varias facciones de otros grupos narcoparamilitares se les han aliado estratégicamente, debido al debilitamiento territorial y militar de organizaciones como Los Rastrojos , Los Paisas

descriptions: Clan del Golfo, Los Rastrojos, and Los Paisas held a secret meeting in 2012 to end conflicts and work together.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes del Clan Úsuga, al igual que de los desaparecidos Rastrojos y Paisas, habrían sostenido una reunión clandestina en 2012 en la ciudad de Medellín , para acordar una repartición de "territorios" a nivel nacional y así acabar con los enfrentamientos entre las mismas organizaciones criminales y comenzar a trabajar en conjunto para una futura alianza.

descriptions: Clan del Golfo shares the drug trafficking scene with Los Paisas.
edges.evidence_quote: Comparte el escenario del narcotráfico con otras bandas narcoterroristas , entre las que se encuentran ... Los Paisas (extintos en 2014)

descriptions: Clan del Golfo and Los Paisas jointly controlled the area of Tierralta.
edges.evidence_quote: el Clan Úsuga retuvo el control de la zona, junto con la bacrim de Los Paisas

descriptions: Survivors of Los Paisas joined Los Caparrapos.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Paisas fueron abatidos y detenidos por la Fuerza Pública, y los sobrevivientes se unieron a Los Caparrapos.

descriptions: Los Paisas aimed to destroy Clan Úsuga (Clan del Golfo).
edges.evidence_quote: los Paisas habían puesto sus ojos en la destrucción del Clan Úsuga a toda costa

descriptions: Los Paisas were a franchise of Los Urabeños.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Paisas, una franquicia del entonces llamado Los Urabeños.

descriptions: Remnants of Los Paisas joined Clan del Golfo after its dissolution.
edges.evidence_quote: los miembros que han escapado de las autoridades formaron a ser parte del Clan Úsuga , conocido también como Clan del Golfo .

descriptions: Los Paisas, Clan Úsuga, and Los Rastrojos held a meeting to divide territories and end conflicts.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes de Los Paisas , junto a los líderes del Clan Úsuga y Los Rastrojos , habrían sostenido una reunión clandestina en la ciudad de Medellín, con el fin de acordar una repartición de "territorios"

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Rastrojos as an ally of Los Paisas.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Authorities suspect Los Paisas had agreements with Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: las autoridades apuntan a acuerdos con el cartel mexicano de Los Zetas

descriptions: Infobox lists Oficina de Envigado as an enemy of Los Paisas.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de Colombia , Clan del Golfo , Oficina de Envigado

descriptions: Los Paisas originated as a rural militia group within the Oficina de Envigado.
edges.evidence_quote: Inicialmente, Los Paisas fue un grupo de milicias rurales de la Oficina de Envigado

descriptions: Los Paisas may have reached agreements with FARC fronts.
edges.evidence_quote: pudieron haber llegado a acuerdos con otros grupos al margen de la ley como algunos frentes de las Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia (FARC).

descriptions: Los Rastrojos and Los Paisas held a meeting to end conflicts and form an alliance, but it did not materialize.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes de Los Rastrojos , junto a los líderes del Clan del Golfo y los desaparecidos Paisas , sostuvieron una reunión clandestina en la ciudad de Medellín , para acordar una repartición de 'territorios' a nivel nacional; de esta manera, buscaban acabar los enfrentamientos entre las mismas organizaciones criminales y trabajar en conjunto para una alianza que al final no se dio.

descriptions: Los Rastrojos are allied with Los Paisas according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Paisas (desarticulado)

descriptions: Los Paisas formed from a split of rural militias from La Oficina.
edges.evidence_quote: las milicias rurales de La Oficina se separaran de la organización, formando posteriormente la banda criminal conocida como 'Los Paisas'

descriptions: Tren de Aragua killed a leader of Los Paisas, starting a war.
edges.evidence_quote: El 5 de septiembre de 2023, sicarios del Tren de Aragua acribillan a Starly Torres Murzzi, señalado de ser cabecilla de la banda delincuencial ‘Los Paisas’
